CONTENT.Early life: Imad Faraj was born in Croix, in the north of France, and is of Moroccan and Algerian descent. He holds both French and Moroccan nationalities.
CONTENT.Club career: Faraj made his professional debut for Lille in a Ligue 1 2–0 loss to SM Caen on 20 August 2017.On 31 July 2020, Faraj joined Belgian First Division A club Mouscron on a one-year deal.On 16 August 2021, he signed a one-year contract with AEK Larnaca in Cyprus, with an option for a second year.
CONTENT.Personal life: Faraj is the older brother of Algerian youth international footballer Samy Faraj.
CONTENT.External links: Imad Faraj at the French Football Federation (in French)Imad Faraj at the French Football Federation (archived) (in French)Imad Faraj at SoccerwayImad Faraj – French league stats at LFP – also available in French (archived)Imad Faraj at L'Équipe Football (in French)
CONTENT.International career: Faraj is a former youth international for France.

SUMMARY: Imad Faraj (born 11 February 1999) is a French professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Cypriot club AEK Larnaca.
